\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID4249 introduces Text Lost Relation as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{equation}\nR_{\\text{lost}} = \\int_{j \\in J_{\\text{all}}} V_{\\text{patent}}(j)\\, \\mathbb{1}_{\\{j \\in J_{\\text{lost}}\\}}\\ dj~.\n\\end{equation}
